apply: Students will be able to apply leadership skills in organizing physical activities.
Students will be able to plan and execute a physical activity event.
Students will be able to demonstrate effective communication skills in physical activity leadership.
Students will be able to lead a team in physical activity and provide constructive feedback.
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the effectiveness of a physical activity program and provide suggestions for improvement.
Students will be able to evaluate the leadership skills of a physical activity leader and provide feedback.
Students will be able to compare and contrast different leadership styles in physical activity.
Students will be able to identify and explain the factors that influence leadership in physical activity.
remember: Students will be able to recall and list different types of physical activities.
Students will be able to describe the importance of physical activity in everyday life.
Students will be able to identify the role of leadership in physical activity.
Students will be able to explain the characteristics of a good leader in physical activity.
understand: Students will be able to understand the benefits of physical activity on physical and mental health.
Students will be able to comprehend the principles of leadership in physical activity.
Students will be able to analyze the role of communication in effective leadership in physical activity.
Students will be able to explain the importance of teamwork in physical activity.

ncert_objectives: To understand the importance of physical activity in everyday life.
To develop leadership skills through physical activity.
To understand the principles of leadership in physical activity.
To apply leadership skills in organizing physical activities.
board_exam_objectives: To describe the role of physical activity in promoting physical and mental health.
To explain the characteristics of a good leader in physical activity.
To evaluate the effectiveness of a physical activity program and provide suggestions for improvement.
To identify and explain the factors that influence leadership in physical activity.
